summary: Completed comprehensive testing of OCR fallback mechanism for resume upload and analysis. Backend OCR functionality is working correctly with 75% test success rate. Frontend authentication issues prevented full UI testing, but code review confirms OCR UI components are properly implemented.

performance_issues.issue: Request timeout after 60 seconds during AI generation
performance_issues.impact: Interview prep generation may fail under load

timeout_issues.issue: Delete operations timing out after 10 seconds
timeout_issues.symptoms: Cleanup operations fail with read timeout
timeout_issues.workaround: Increase timeout or implement async deletion

authentication_issues.issue: Unable to successfully authenticate and access protected routes

navigation_issues.issue: Cannot navigate to authenticated resumes page for UI testing

passed_tests: Upload Resume Image (OCR) - ✅ OCR used: True, Method: ocr
File Type Validation Comprehensive - ✅ Supports PDF, DOCX, PNG, JPG
Resume Metadata Fields - ✅ extraction_method, extraction_status, ocr_used present
Job Match Analysis - ✅ Comprehensive analysis with match_score
Extraction Integration with Job Match - ✅ Score: 72

critical_fixes: Fix frontend authentication flow - users cannot login/register successfully
Investigate navigation issues preventing access to protected routes
performance_improvements: Increase timeout for AI-intensive operations (interview prep generation)
Optimize delete operations to prevent timeouts
verification_needed: Test OCR UI components once authentication is fixed
